description.value: An ancient magical lantern recovered from Rickety Frets’s provisions in the Bioluminescent Library. It emits a soft blue-green light that never fades and requires no fuel. The light has a slightly living quality — as if something small and patient breathes inside the glass. Dimmer than a torch, it nonetheless pushes back absolute darkness with quiet certainty.
description.director:
ACQUISITION: Found among Rickety Frets’s provisions in the Bioluminescent Library, Beat 12. The party may take it after completing the Three Demands oath.

MECHANICS:

  • Illuminates a 15-foot radius in dim blue-green light (counts as magical light — dispels magical darkness). Never requires fuel or maintenance.
  • The light is slightly unsettling to undead and constructs within 10ft — not a mechanical effect, but something they avoid or regard warily.
  • Dimmer than a torch in clear air; in cave/dark environments it feels brighter because there is otherwise nothing.
  • Does not produce heat.

FICTION: The lantern glows with a faint living light, like something breathing inside the glass. It was made by an early Keeper and left in the library as a reading light. It has been burning, quietly, for approximately four hundred years.
